commit_message: Alternate IRQ Race Condition fix Alternate IRQ Race Condition fix This is an alternate method of avoiding the crash After Burner II is seeing because of a race condition in getting/clearing the timer IRQ and jumping to the IRQ Vector.  I'm not sure this is correct, but it does work for both After Burner II and Tsuppari Sumo.
